prospect.name: Kevin Park
prospect.title: Head of Brand Trust and Protection

research_text: Kevin Park leads brand trust and protection at Cascade Commerce Group, reporting to Robert Kline. He manages the brand registry program, seller compliance, and proactive enforcement actions. He is building out automated detection capabilities and has been testing several third-party tools for counterfeit listing detection. He is also responsible for the brand partner relationships that depend on effective IP enforcement on the platform. He needs tools that can scale enforcement across 8,000+ sellers without proportional headcount growth.
offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
